MOTION To Consolidate Three Wrongful Death/Lung Cancer/Brayton Cases Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Joinder Of Cases Pursuant To C.C.P. 378, And To Proceed With Trial By Alternative Means
Off Calendar Oct-01-2020 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR PREFERENCE / PREFERENTIAL SETTING
Off Calendar Aug-20-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing by CourtCall for plaintiffs Patricia Benson as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir of James Benson, Deceased, et al.

RULING: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL.

No argument is held and the tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Plaintiffs' Motion for Order Granting Preference in Setting Case for Trial Current Trial is GRANTED pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). No opposition filed. The trial date of November 30, 2020 is vacated. The new trial date is December 7, 2020 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is December 18, 2020.

All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the initial July 8, 2019 trial date.

Plaintiffs to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than October 23, 2020. Responses to the demand are due no later than November 6, 2020. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands/offers stating their best and final settlement effort. This confidential value must be separately submitted to Commissioner Pang Ly via electronic mail by November 27, 2020 at 12:00 p.m. Mandatory settlement conference is set for Thursday, December 3, 2020 at 9 a.m. in 603. Personal appearance is required by all unless a party is granted excuse based on good cause. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: J. Alameda. Matter not reported. (503/CML)
